title: entada wahlbergii
intro: Entada wahlbergii, also known as the 'Roxburgh's Coral Tree', is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Entada wahlbergii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing, among others. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
